init.title: Shopping List with Grocy Polling - Configuration
init.description:
Configure your Grocy polling settings.

This variant refreshes Grocy on a fixed interval and refreshes images on a separate schedule.

data.image_download_size: Downloaded product image size? (Select 0 to disable images)
data.poll_interval_seconds: Refresh Grocy data every X seconds
data.request_spacing_ms: Wait X milliseconds between Grocy API requests
data.image_refresh_interval_hours: Refresh product images every X hours
data.image_refresh_time: Refresh product images daily at HH:MM

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.description: Advanced algorithm settings and selection criteria.

data.consumption_weight: How much to consider usage patterns (0.0-1.0)
data.frequency_weight: How much to consider purchase history (0.0-1.0)
data.seasonal_weight: How much to consider seasonal trends (0.0-1.0)
data.suggest_create_only_no_match: Only suggest creating new products when no matches are found
